concerns.location: spec.md:User Story 1 – End‑to‑End Data‑Driven Texture Prediction
concerns.text: User Story 1 lacks explicit anchoring to FRs. While the story's scope clearly *implies* coverage by FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004, FR-005, and FR-007, this is implicit. Add an explicit anchor (e.g., 'See FR-001') to each relevant FR within the story description or acceptance scenarios.

concerns.location: spec.md:User Story 2 – Model Evaluation & Feature‑Importance Reporting
concerns.text: User Story 2 lacks explicit anchoring to FRs. While the story's scope clearly *implies* coverage by FR-004 and FR-005, this is implicit. Add an explicit anchor (e.g., 'See FR-004') to each relevant FR within the story description or acceptance scenarios.

User Story 3 lacks explicit anchoring to FRs. While the story's scope clearly *implies* coverage by FR-006, this is implicit. Add an explicit anchor (e.g., 'See FR-006') to the relevant FR within the story description or acceptance scenarios.

FR-003 mentions 'pymtex or an equivalent spherical-harmonic approximation'. While acceptable, consider adding a brief note about the criteria for 'equivalence' to avoid ambiguity during implementation.
